note: IB Diploma Programme Group 4 — Sciences. Subjects: Biology, Chemistry, Physics, Computer Science, Environmental Systems and Societies (ESS), Sports, Exercise, and Health Science (SEHS). All at SL and HL except ESS (SL only). Topic structure from first examinations 2016; some subjects updated 2025.

topics.subject: Biology
topics.subtopicTitle: Cell theory, membrane structure, and transport
topics.description: Cell theory; prokaryotic and eukaryotic cells; cell membrane (fluid mosaic model); passive and active transport; osmosis; endocytosis and exocytosis

topics.subject: Biology
topics.description: DNA structure and replication; transcription and translation; the genetic code; gene expression; enzymes; metabolic pathways

topics.subject: Biology
topics.description: Chromosome structure; meiosis; monohybrid and dihybrid crosses; Mendel's laws; sex-linked traits; polygenic inheritance (HL)

topics.subject: Biology
topics.subtopicTitle: Ecosystems, energy flow, and nutrient cycling
topics.description: Species, populations, communities, ecosystems; energy flow through food chains and webs; carbon and nitrogen cycling; impact of human activity

topics.subject: Biology
topics.description: Evidence for evolution; natural selection; speciation; classification (three domains); cladistics (HL)

topics.subject: Biology
topics.subtopicTitle: Digestion, respiration, blood, and neural control
topics.description: Digestive system; gas exchange; blood composition and transport; immune response; neural and hormonal coordination; reproduction (HL: further detail on immune system and kidneys)

topics.subject: Chemistry
topics.description: Relative atomic mass; moles; chemical equations; limiting reagents; percentage yield and composition; concentration calculations

topics.subject: Chemistry
topics.description: Nuclear structure; electron configuration; atomic emission spectra; periodic trends (ionisation energy, electronegativity, atomic radius); HL: sub-shell electron filling and spectroscopy

topics.subject: Chemistry
topics.subtopicTitle: Ionic, covalent, and metallic bonding; VSEPR
topics.description: Types of bonding; Lewis structures; VSEPR theory and molecular geometry; intermolecular forces; physical properties from bonding type; HL: hybridisation, resonance

topics.subject: Chemistry
topics.subtopicTitle: Enthalpy changes, Hess's Law, and bond enthalpies
topics.description: Exothermic and endothermic reactions; enthalpy of combustion and neutralisation; Hess's Law; bond enthalpies; HL: Born-Haber cycles, Gibbs free energy

topics.subject: Chemistry
topics.subtopicTitle: Equilibrium constant and Le Chatelier's principle
topics.description: Dynamic equilibrium; Kc and Kp expressions; Le Chatelier's principle; industrial applications (Haber process); HL: Kw, solubility product, common ion effect

topics.subject: Chemistry
topics.subtopicTitle: pH scale, neutralisation, and buffer solutions
topics.description: Brønsted-Lowry theory; strong and weak acids and bases; pH calculations; neutralisation; HL: Ka and Kb; buffer solutions; acid-base titration curves

topics.subject: Physics
topics.subtopicTitle: Kinematics, forces, work, energy, and momentum
topics.description: Kinematic equations; Newton's three laws; projectile motion; work, energy, and power; impulse and momentum; conservation laws; HL: torque and circular motion

topics.subject: Physics
topics.description: Temperature scales; specific heat capacity; ideal gas law; kinetic theory; first and second laws of thermodynamics (HL)

topics.subject: Physics
topics.subtopicTitle: Wave properties, superposition, and standing waves
topics.description: Wave properties (amplitude, frequency, wavelength, speed); transverse and longitudinal waves; superposition; standing waves; Doppler effect; HL: single-slit diffraction, interference, polarisation

topics.subject: Physics
topics.subtopicTitle: Electric fields, circuits, and magnetic forces
topics.description: Coulomb's law; electric field and potential; current, resistance, Ohm's law; series and parallel circuits; magnetic fields; electromagnetic induction; HL: Faraday's and Lenz's laws; capacitors

topics.subject: Physics
topics.subtopicTitle: Nuclear reactions, radioactivity, and particle physics
topics.description: Nuclear structure; radioactive decay (alpha, beta, gamma); half-life; nuclear fission and fusion; binding energy; Standard Model overview (HL: deeper particle physics)
